## Task 1: Delete old files
```bash
rm -f .hivemind/state/delegations.json
rm -f .hivemind/state/session-continuity.json
git add -A && git commit -m "chore(P41-D-03): delete delegations.json + session-continuity.json (migrated to session-tracker)"
```

## Task 2: Update tests affected by file deletion
- `tests/lib/continuity.test.ts` — remove tests that expect file writes to session-continuity.json
- `tests/lib/delegation-persistence.test.ts` — update to expect empty reads
- `tests/coordination/delegation-manager.test.ts` — update if reads delegations.json
- Any other tests that fail

## Task 3: Gate verification
```bash
npm run typecheck
npm test
git add -A && git commit -m "feat(P41-D-03): delete old state files + update tests"
```
